revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Mbox templates}}
{{tl|Mbox templates}} is the small template that appears as opposite at the top of documentation for templates in the [[:Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]]. It takes no parameters.
===See also=== * {{tl|Mbox templates see also}}, used at the end of Mbox-family templates' documentation.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other| | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Mbox templates}}
{{tl|Mbox templates}} is the small template that appears as opposite at the top of documentation for templates in the [[:Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]]. It takes no parameters.
===See also=== * {{tl|Mbox templates see also}}, used at the end of Mbox-family templates' documentation.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other| | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Mbox templates}}
{{tl|Mbox templates}} is the small template that appears as opposite at the top of documentation for templates in the [[:Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]]. It takes no parameters.
===See also=== * {{tl|Mbox templates see also}}, used at the end of Mbox-family templates' documentation.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other| | <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Mbox templates}}
{{tl|Mbox templates}} is the small template that appears as opposite at the top of documentation for templates in the [[:Category:Mbox and messagebox templates]]. It takes no parameters.
===See also=== * {{tl|Mbox templates see also}}, used at the end of Mbox-family templates' documentation.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other| | }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Mbox and messagebox templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
